faq.question: What door materials does Jeld-Wen offer?
faq.answer: Jeld-Wen offers wood, fiberglass, and steel entry doors along with sliding and hinged patio doors, so you can balance appearance, durability, and budget.

faq.question: Are Jeld-Wen doors energy efficient?
faq.answer: Yes. Many Jeld-Wen doors include energy-efficient glass and insulated cores that help keep your home comfortable and reduce energy costs.

faq.question: Which Jeld-Wen door is right for me?
faq.answer: It depends on your priorities — fiberglass and steel are great for low maintenance and security, while wood offers classic warmth. We'll recommend the best fit during your consultation.

faq.question: Do you install Jeld-Wen doors in the Bay Area?
faq.answer: Yes. Deluxe Windows provides professional measurement and installation of Jeld-Wen doors throughout the Bay Area.
